description: Set the number of cells to be used in cell-mapped contact detection. Default is 10 x 10 x 10.

keywords.name: adaptive
keywords.description: Turn on or off adaptive cell space. The adaptive cell space is useful when there is a very large range in block sizes. It is not recommended to turn on the adaptive cell space when importing many blocks, although it can be turned on after importing. The default is off.

keywords.name: size
keywords.description: Set the number of cells in the \(x\) -direction, optionally followed by the number of cells in the \(y\) -direction and \(z\) -direction. If \(y\) - and \(z\) -values are not given, they are assumed to be the same as the \(x\) -value. (The default = 10.)
